name: dsp-openapi-comparison
description: This project compares two ways of generating Node.js server stubs from the same OpenAPI specification.

scripts.generate:final: openapi-generator-cli generate -i openapi/openapi.yaml -g nodejs-express-server -t out -o generated-openapi-generator-custom
scripts.start:final: npm run generate:final && cd generated-openapi-generator-custom && npm install && npm start
scripts.start:initial: cd generated-openapi-generator && npm install && npm start
